actions.value: The most recent update to Edge caused an issue with older devices (any device below iOS 13 and Android 8.0). The app will not load. You can login from a new device to access your account. Edge will have the fix released in 3.18.0 within the next couple days.

The most recent update to Edge caused an issue with older devices (any device below iOS 13 and Android 8.0). The app will not load. You can login from a new device to access your account. Edge will have the fix released in 3.18.0 within the next couple days.
